calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings By Cross-Defendant 2171 Pacific G1, Lp
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT 2171 PACIFIC G1, LP Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings By Cross-Defendant 2171 Pacific G1, LP is moot. Cross-Complaint filed without leave of Court is stricken. The Court was not able to locate any request for leave to file a cross-complaint or an order granting such request.
The Court notes that the Cross-Complaint in its current form on file is devoid of any facts establishing the basis for liability/relief as to the moving party that allegedly became involved with the property on November 28, 2020, 21 days after the Plaintiffs vacated the premises (Paragraphs 12 and 13). However, these allegations are not incorporated into the factually devoid causes of action for total equitable indemnity, apportionment of fault and declaratory relief. The only conceivable relationship, based on the current cross-complaint, between the cross-defendants and the allegations in the Complaint is the June 2020 Residential Income Property Purchase Agreement (Cross-Complaint, paragraph 9, also not incorporated into the causes of action asserted against the moving party) which is expressly disclaimed as being the basis for connection/liability/relief of the moving party in the cross-complainant's opposition to this motion. At a minimum the cross-complaint on file is uncertain. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-28-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
